results.rendered_html:
ārdhika a. (kī f.) [ardhamarhati ṭhak] Sharing half, relating to a half.
— kaḥ One who ploughs the land for half the crop; one born of a Vaiśya woman, and brought up by a Brāhmaṇa; see the quotation under ārdhika.
